strategy: This is a trivial solo fight. Roberto is a Rank 2 Fire boss with only 350 health and no minions or recorded cheats; the guide notes even a level 5 wizard can beat him without much trouble.
He does -20% outgoing damage, so his own hits are weak. Just blade once and hit.
Open with a single blade (any school blade you carry), then land any 2-3 pip attack to close it out in a round or two.
He is stunable and beguilable if you want extra safety, but it is rarely needed at this health total. No prisms or setup are required.
